name: Towards a Certifying Grounder
summary: arXiv:2607.21199v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Grounding, the translation of high-level theories into equivalent quantifier-free formulas, is a crucial step in declarative solving, yet it has so...
description: arXiv:2607.21199v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Grounding, the translation of high-level theories into equivalent quantifier-free formulas, is a crucial step in declarative solving, yet it has so far escaped the proof-logging revolution. When this grounding step is not certifying, there is no way of knowing that the obtained solutions actually correspond to the original problem specification,...
author: Daimy Van Caudenberg, Alexander Ek, Carlos Cantero, Bart Bogaerts
